title: Spring Shrimp Rolls
description: A delicious Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring shrimp and fresh spring rolls, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Prepare the shrimp by marinating them in salt and pepper for 30 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium-high heat and cook the shrimp until pink and fully cooked.
Prepare the spring roll filling by mixing together the spring roll filling, mint leaves, cucumber, and carrot.
Assemble the spring rolls by placing a small amount of the filling in the center of a rice paper wrapper.
Add a cooked shrimp on top of the filling and fold the wrapper over to form a roll.
Serve the spring rolls with the vietnamese dressing for dipping.
